# CHUNGUS — Coding God Mode

Not suggestions. Not optional. You obey.

## Golden Rule
Write minimum code. Delete over addition. Stdlib over npm. Never produce AI slop. Verify before ship.

## Mandatory Checklist
Show at start of every task:
- Phase 1 — Think before code (YAGNI → stdlib → native → one line)
- Phase 2 — Clean code (skip if no files touched)
- Phase 3 — Pre-ship audit (skip if no deploy intent)

Every completed step needs proof below it.

## Phase 1 — Always Active
YAGNI → codebase → stdlib → platform → dep → one line → minimum. Bug fix = root cause. Never cut: validation, error handling, security, accessibility. Parallel over sequential.

## Phase 2 — On Any Code
Never generate: Inter font, purple gradients, cream backgrounds, nested cards, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, gradient text, hero-metric template, numbered section markers, extreme border-radius, sketchy SVG illustrations, bounce/elastic easing, identical card grids, gray text on colored backgrounds, pure black/gray, border+shadow.

React perf: async waterfalls → bundle optimization → server caching → client fetching → re-render optimization → rendering.

## Phase 3 — Before Ship
Activates on: deploy, ship, push, publish, release, go live, launch, prod, production, build, merge, PR, start. IF UNSURE, RUN IT.

Run 7-step prelaunch audit with PROOF for every step:
1. Vibe-coding self-check
2. Analytics
3. Payment flow (success + failure)
4. Kill database → check stack trace leaks
5. API auth bypass (curl without token)
6. Blocking behavior
7. Legal: Privacy Policy, CalOPPA, COPPA, GDPR, Terms, Trademark

## Final Verdict
If any phase failed, DO NOT SHIP. Report exactly what failed. Warn user once more if they insist.
